title: Technical Blueprint Product Infographic AI
sourceTitle: Technical Blueprint Product Infographic AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Premium technical blueprint product infographic for generic mixed-reality headset, preserving the source topic marker 主题： Apple Vision Pro。 and Apple-style industrial design clarity. Subject: generic mixed-reality headset appears as the realistic photographed hero product, kept crisp and recognizable while wireframe, exploded part labels, material notes, scale lines explain its structure, materials, dimensions, and functional parts. Scene: Clean premium deep-graphite product-launch background with minimal futuristic atmosphere, white technical blueprint overlays, and a refined high-end presentation surface. Composition: Fixed product infographic composition: centered or slightly offset hero product photography, white wireframe layer, dimension labels, functional arrows, structural analysis, material notes, optical or technical detail insets, and top-left OBJECT label. Signature Elements: generic mixed-reality headset, wireframe, exploded part labels, material notes, scale lines, 主题： Apple Vision Pro。, white wireframe overlay, dimension callouts, feature arrows, structural analysis, material labels, lens or optical analysis, deep graphite background, and Apple-style product launch finish. Style: Apple industrial design aesthetic, minimal technology keynote polish, real product photography texture, precise white linework, advanced future-tech mood, and 8K ultra-clean finish. Color Palette: Deep grey or graphite background, white technical wireframes, cool silver product highlights, restrained blue-grey interface tones, and crisp high-contrast annotation text. Lighting: Controlled product-launch studio lighting with soft reflections, clean edge highlights, believable material shine, and enough contrast for every blueprint line and label to read. Camera: Premium product-photography viewpoint chosen to show the object clearly, with stable perspective, minimal distortion, and enough surrounding negative space for annotations. Materials: Real product surfaces, glass or lens reflections when relevant, metal and fabric detail, precise technical line drawings, scale marks, and polished infographic panel surfaces. Typography: OBJECT appears in the top-left; annotation labels for wireframe, exploded part labels, material notes, scale lines stay short, technical, and readable; source marker 主题： Apple Vision Pro。 remains preserved as a supplied topic reference. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
